sources.title: Jhooth Bole Kauwa Kaate 1998 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub

metadata.Plot: Abhyankar (Amrish Puri) is an orthodox head of his family, a retired police officer, he has values which he wants his family to also uphold. As a result of his values, his daughter is unable to be forthright and is unable to introduce the young man (Anil Kapoor) she loves, and concocts a scheme whereby her father would approve of her lover. What results is quite hilarious.
metadata.Writer: Sachin Bhowmick, Zaheer D. Lari, Hrishikesh Mukherjee
metadata.Actors: Anil Kapoor, Juhi Chawla, Amrish Puri
